content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — HomeKit imported and `HMHomeManager()` instantiated in WallpaperGridView.swift:5, but the view only lists wallpaper categories with no home-automation UI or accessory features whatsoever.
Pierre: Apple requires HomeKit usage to be tied to genuine home-automation functionality — an unrelated wallpaper app instantiating HMHomeManager looks like framework misuse and may trigger a rejection or review question, especially since this likely also requires an unused NSHomeKitUsageDescription. Since HomeKit serves no purpose here, remove the import/HMHomeManager entirely, or if it's leftover/test code, delete it before submission.
